title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at ISRO Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at ISRO Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
ISRO Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ISRO Advisory Limited:
ISRO Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ISRO Advisory Limited!
